creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Thu 23 nov 06 at 16:53:03 +0100, Simon Olofsson <simon@olofsson.de>
 wrote:

> >Description:
> This version is very old and the port is unmaintained.
> Useres could install www/xpi-mozex (a newer version) or use the extensions
> manager to install it from the website http://mozex.mozdev.org/.

Please don't do that!

xpi-mozex is for Firefox, but Mozilla (admittedly end-of-life) and also
Seamonkey still use it. I have planned to deprecate these old xpi- ports
when Seamonkey will adopt the new Gecko engine.

Regards,
-- 
Th. Thomas.
